purpose: Identifies the normalized authoritative docs, remaining issue groups, dependencies, and containment rules for Phase 5 backlog generation.

issue_groups_for_next_phase.title: M1: First Playable Store
depends_on_design: Sports store deep dive (to be created in Phase 4A)
issue_groups_for_next_phase.note: These design docs must be created BEFORE generating M1 issues. The next phase should create them as repo docs, then generate issues from them.

issue_groups_for_next_phase.title: Content Pipeline Tooling
issue_groups_for_next_phase.note: Schema is locked. Tooling issues can be generated immediately.

issue_groups_for_next_phase.title: M2-M4: Economy, Customers, Multi-Store, Progression
issue_groups_for_next_phase.note: Requires Phase 4B-4C design docs. Cannot be generated until those exist.

issue_groups_for_next_phase.title: M5-M7: Remaining Stores, Polish, Release
issue_groups_for_next_phase.note: Generated last. Can wait until M1-M4 backlog is stable.

issue_groups_for_next_phase.title: Secret Meta-Narrative Implementation
issue_groups_for_next_phase.note: Never on critical path. Tagged secret-thread. Scoped within M4-M6 milestones.

major_dependencies_to_preserve: SSOT corrections must remain applied — do not reintroduce base_value, old condition scales, or wrong paths
Phase 4A design docs (Sports deep dive, Content Scale, UI Spec, Vertical Slice) must be created before M1 issues
Phase 4B-4C design docs must be created before M2-M7 issues
ItemInstance class must be used for all inventory implementation (not single-condition ItemDefinition)
All autoload references must match project.godot (4 autoloads only)
secret_thread_containment_rules: Never generate secret thread issues on the critical path for any milestone
Secret thread issues must extend existing systems, not create new ones
Secret thread must not affect economy balance, progression gates, or core completion
All secret thread issues must reference docs/design/SECRET_THREAD.md
Secret thread implementation starts no earlier than M4
The 3 ending variants are M7 polish work
